leadText: The White Dish (Japanese: ホワイトプレート White Plate) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX. It is currently unobtainable.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The White Dish serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player 's picnic.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A dish for picnics. Comes in plenty of colors to choose from based on the food or the mood. The white variety comes recommended by sellers.
